channel.title: attr on My Hugo
channel.description: Recent content in attr on My Hugo

item.title: ODBC Attributes
item.description: Environ Attributes Attribute Version Type Description SQL_ATTR_CONNECTION_POOLING 3.8 SQLUINTEGER SQL_CP_OFF (default)SQL_CP_ONE_PER_DRIVERSQL_CP_ONE_PER_HENVSQL_CP_DRIVER_AWARE SQL_ATTR_CP_MATCH 3.0 SQLUINTEGER SQL_CP_STRICT_MATCH (default)SQL_CP_RELAXED_MATCH SQL_ATTR_ODBC_VERSION 3.0 SQLUINTEGER SQL_OV_ODBC3_80SQL_OV_ODBC3 SQL_OV_ODBC2 SQL_ATTR_OUTPUT_NTS 3.0 SQLUINTEGER SQL_TRUE (default) Connect Attributes Attribute Version Type Description SQL_ATTR_ACCESS_MODE 1.0 SQLUINTEGER SQL_MODE_READ_WRITE (default)SQL_MODE_READ_ONLY SQL_ATTR_ASYNC_DBC_EVENT 3.3 SQLPOINTER event handler SQL_ATTR_ASYNC_DBC_FUNCTIONS_ENABLE 3.
